description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a light oak finish, featuring a spacious flat top surface suitable for writing or computer work. On the left side, there are three vertically stacked drawers with metallic handles, providing organized storage for office supplies or documents. The right side has a large cabinet door, also with a metallic handle, likely concealing a larger storage compartment. An open shelf unit is integrated on the right, offering additional accessible storage or display space. The desk's design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a sturdy build. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, giving it a natural and contemporary appearance.
description: A light oak-finished wooden desk with three drawers, a cabinet, and an open shelf, featuring a spacious flat top and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf on the right and the cabinet door on the left, with the main workspace surface visible.
description_view_1: Side view of the desk's right panel, displaying the wood grain and the solid side structure.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the three drawers on the left, the open shelf on the right, and the full width of the desktop.
description_view_3: Side view of the desk's left panel, showing the solid wood grain and the back of the cabinet section.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and open shelf is intended to face the user, with the flat desktop serving as the primary workspace and storage features accessible from the front.
